article.title: Noizekid: A Profile of the Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his trajectory.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid emerges as a significant figure in the Latin electronic music landscape, known for his work in moombahton and dancehall.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican producer whose work in moombahton and dancehall has garnered attention across the electronic music scene. His collaborations with prominent figures such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer underscore his influence in the industry.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has contributed to the broader music community by releasing the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, offering insight into his creative process and sound design techniques.

His approach to production is characterized by a fusion of traditional dancehall rhythms with modern electronic elements, resulting in a distinctive sound that resonates within both underground and mainstream circles.
While his discography and track listings remain largely unindexed, Noizekid's impact is evident through his ongoing work with established artists and his contributions to the production community.
